name: Libromancer Intervention
name_jp: リブロマンサー・インターフェア
desc: When your opponent activates a card or effect: Target 1 "Libromancer" Ritual Monster you control; return it to the hand, and if you do, negate that activated effect, then you can Special Summon 1 "Libromancer" monster from your hand or GY. You can only activate 1 "Libromancer Intervention" per turn.
eff: When your opponent activates a card or effect: Target 1 "Libromancer" Ritual Monster you control; return it to the hand, and if you do, negate that activated effect, then you can Special Summon 1 "Libromancer" monster from your hand or GY. You can only activate 1 "Libromancer Intervention" per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Returns from your field to your hand
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Trap Cards
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
